basic_details.job_title: Madurai Court Law Officers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 31 Posts

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than 7 years practice for Public Prosecutor or Additional Public Prosecutor, Advocate with not less than 10 years practice for Special Public Prosecutor
qualification.details: Public Prosecutor / Government Pleader / Additional Public Prosecutor: Advocate with not less than 7 years of practice. Special Public Prosecutor: Advocate with not less than 10 years of practice.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Special Public Prosecutor-I (Scheduled Castes & Scheduled Tribes)
Additional Government Pleader, cum Additional Public Prosecutor

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Madurai Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Madurai Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Law Officer posts is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 31 vacancies announced for various Law Officer positions by the Madurai Court.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these Law Officer positions is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum practice years required for an Advocate to apply?
faq.answer: For Public Prosecutor and Additional Public Prosecutor roles, an advocate needs at least 7 years of practice. For Special Public Prosecutor roles, a minimum of 10 years of practice is required.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Law Officer positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these recruitments?
faq.answer: The job type for these Law Officer positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q7. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Madurai Court, located in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Roc.No.C4/e-4593516/2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves the submission of the application. Further details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form download link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article, once released by the organization.
